texto: You'll be having a good time and all of a sudden everyone will start running to the bathroom. If you're going to do drugs just do them in front of everybody, don't be running off to the bathroom. It's rude.
explicacao: Citação de Eileen Polk sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “You'll be having a good time and all of a sudden everyone will start running to the bathroom. If …” articula tempo, drugs, punk em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como punk.
